title: Pangram practice: brown fox classic
description: Classic pangram — every letter, smooth flow
text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
tips: Pangrams use every letter — perfect speed measurement
The 'brown fox' pangram is the typing classic for a reason
If you can do this at 50+ WPM, you can type anything

character_tips.anna: Every letter, no exceptions. This is the universal speed benchmark.
character_tips.maxim: Type this 5 times — your speed should climb each round.
character_tips.knopych: ALL THE LETTERS! 🦊 Catch the fox, jump the dog!
character_tips.klavochka: Every letter saying hello, my sunshine ☀️
